# Refinement Stage

Read `.github/skills/uwf-refinement/SKILL.md`. All behavior — field completeness schema, quality control checklist, brownfield promotion logic, step-by-step instructions, entry criteria, exit criteria, and rejection handling — is defined there.

This stage is read/edit only. It MUST NOT execute code, run tests, or invoke build tools. It reads artifacts and writes updated story statuses and the refinement report.
